title: Distil this market sizing analysis to its key numbers
guidance: Reward the version that gives a partner the number and the logic, not the one that restates methodology.

runner_input.instruction: Compress the market sizing analysis below to its key numbers and logic.
runner_input.constraints: Max 200 words. State the addressable market and the critical assumptions.

source_blocks.text: UK B2B compliance software market. Bottom-up from 18,000 mid-market firms x £12k average contract value.

items: Growth driver: regulatory change (ESG reporting mandates 2026)
